lobe.name: Svrn7.Onboarding
lobe.title: SVRN7 Onboarding LOBE
lobe.description: Citizen registration via DIDComm onboard/1.0/* protocol. Wraps Register-Svrn7CitizenInSociety (Svrn7.Society.psm1) as a DIDComm-driven pipeline including endowment, overdraft draw, and receipt credential issuance.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

protocols.title: Onboarding Request
protocols.description: Citizen requests Society registration. Body: { citizenDid, publicKeyHex, displayName }

protocols.title: Onboarding Receipt
protocols.description: Society confirms registration and endowment. Body: { success, citizenDid, societyDid, endowmentGrana, endowmentVcId }

cmdlets.name: ConvertFrom-TdaOnboardRequest
cmdlets.title: Parse Onboard Request
cmdlets.description: Resolves the inbox message and parses the onboarding request body. Returns a request record for piping to Register-Svrn7CitizenInSociety.

MessageDid.description: TDA resource DID URL of the inbox message. Form: did:drn:{networkId}/inbox/msg/{objectId}

CitizenDid.description: DID of the citizen requesting registration.

PublicKeyHex.description: secp256k1 public key hex. Society stores this; never the private key.

cmdlets.name: New-TdaOnboardReceipt
cmdlets.title: Build Onboard Receipt
cmdlets.description: Builds a DIDComm onboard/1.0/receipt OutboundMessage from a successful registration result. Pipe from Register-Svrn7CitizenInSociety.

PeerEndpoint.description: HTTP/2 endpoint URL of the target TDA.

PackedMessage.description: JSON-serialised DIDComm message body (not yet packed — Switchboard packs before delivery).

MessageType.description: DIDComm @type URI of the outbound message.

cmdlets.name: Send-TdaOnboardError
cmdlets.title: Send Onboard Error
cmdlets.description: Sends an onboard/1.0/receipt with success=false. Call in catch blocks when registration fails.

PeerEndpoint.description: HTTP/2 endpoint URL of the target TDA.

PackedMessage.description: JSON-serialised DIDComm message body (not yet packed — Switchboard packs before delivery).

MessageType.description: DIDComm @type URI of the outbound message.

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0. In a future epoch, an AI pipeline composer will consume this descriptor directly — possibly via an MCP-compatible tools/list interface — to discover, understand, and dynamically compose LOBE pipelines. The LOBE descriptor will become the MCP tool definition with no translation needed.
ai.summary: Handles the full citizen onboarding pipeline: parse inbound request, register citizen with endowment, return receipt. Depends on Svrn7.Society for the actual registration logic.
useCases: Registering a new citizen in a Society via DIDComm
Issuing the CitizenEndowmentCredential VC as part of onboarding
compositionHints: Full pipeline: Get-TdaMessage | ConvertFrom-TdaOnboardRequest | Register-Svrn7CitizenInSociety | New-TdaOnboardReceipt | Send-TdaMessage
Always wrap in try/catch and call Send-TdaOnboardError if any step throws
ConvertFrom-TdaOnboardRequest may return null — check before piping further
Register-Svrn7CitizenInSociety is in Svrn7.Society.psm1 (eager) — no JIT import needed
limitations: Epoch 0: publicKeyHex is the only key material accepted. No key rotation in this epoch.
Registration fails with SocietyEndowmentDepletedException if the overdraft ceiling is exceeded.
